message:
feat(demo): add Theme Studio screen for live palette editing (bd-vu0o)

Implements the Theme Studio demo screen with:
- Preset list showing all built-in themes (Cyberpunk Aurora, Darcula,
  Lumen Light, Nordic Frost, High Contrast)
- Token inspector with color swatches for semantic tokens
- WCAG contrast ratio validation with AA/AAA ratings
- Export to JSON format
- Vim-style navigation (j/k) and Tab for panel switching
- Ctrl+T to cycle themes globally, Enter to apply preset, E to export

The screen is fully integrated into the demo showcase app with its own
tab, keybindings help, and tick-based updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
